title: begonia × lindquistii
intro: Begonia × lindquistii, also known as the Lindquist Begonia, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Begonia peltata and Begonia sutherlandii. Native to the tropical regions of Central America, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Begonia × lindquistii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, with the leaves and stems being used to make herbal extracts that can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
